text:
is the 3rd chapter of the 1st volume and the 3rd chapter overall of the Spoof on Titan manga, written and illustrated by hounori.

Overview

 A skewed view of life from within the 104th Training Corps. 

Summary

A series of gags in which...

...Connie is given supplemental vertical maneuvering lessons, emphasizing that the hooks of his gear are intended for walls and not people.

...Armin tries counting Titans in order to go to sleep, but decides it is better to go out peacefully than to face them all.

...Sasha learns that grapeshot for cannons does not contain actual grapes.

...Armin gives Eren a birthday present wrapped up in a bow, so Mikasa wraps herself in a bow while letting Eren know she is giving him a present. He does not understand where the present is.

...Eren agrees to let the military barber surprise him with his haircut. It is now cut the same way as Levi and Oluo.

...Jean and Reiner become hypocrites after discovering some bland soup was made by Krista.

...Mike subtly insults Hange by sniffing her while sniffing for Titans.
